features.title: AI Stack Inventory
features.description: Map every seat, plan, vendor, and API workload across Cursor, Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, v0, and model providers.

features.title: Plan Optimization
features.description: Detect over-provisioned seats, duplicate subscriptions, and mismatched team plans before renewals lock in.

features.title: API Spend Intelligence
features.description: Compare model usage against cheaper alternatives, caching strategies, batch processing, and credit opportunities.

features.title: Credex Credit Routing
features.description: High-spend teams get a clear path to discounted AI infrastructure credits and vendor negotiation support.

howItWorks.title: Enter your AI stack
howItWorks.description: Add tools, plan names, monthly spend, seat counts, team size, use cases, and budget pressure.

howItWorks.title: Run the audit model
howItWorks.description: Spendlens benchmarks your spend against startup patterns and current pricing assumptions.

howItWorks.title: Prioritize savings
howItWorks.description: Get downgrade, consolidation, API, and credit recommendations ranked by impact and risk.

testimonials.name: Riya Mehta
testimonials.quote: Spendlens found three duplicated AI subscriptions and a credit opportunity before our seed round budget review.

testimonials.name: Noah Kim
testimonials.quote: The report felt like something our finance and engineering teams could both trust. We cut spend without slowing developers down.

testimonials.name: Amara Lewis
testimonials.quote: It turned scattered Cursor, Copilot, Claude, and API invoices into a clear optimization plan in minutes.

pricing.name: Free Audit
pricing.description: For founders and engineering leads who want a fast AI spend snapshot.

pricing.name: Enterprise Consultation
pricing.description: For teams spending heavily on model APIs, coding agents, and AI seats.

faqs.question: Is this for personal finance?
faqs.answer: No. Spendlens audits AI infrastructure and AI tool spend for startups, CTOs, engineering managers, and finance operators.

faqs.question: Does the audit connect to real invoices?
faqs.answer: This portfolio version uses dummy data and manual inputs. A production version could connect billing exports, SSO seat data, and API usage logs.

faqs.question: When should I talk to Credex?
faqs.answer: If potential savings exceed $500/month or your API spend is growing quickly, Credex can help unlock AI infrastructure credits and better purchasing paths.
